title: vitis vinifera var. vulpina
intro: Vitis vinifera var. vulpina, also known as Fox Grape or Red-berried Bramble, is a deciduous climbing shrub belonging to the Vitaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Vitis vinifera var. vulpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Vitis vinifera var. vulpina can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
